mapper.sql: id, asset_code, asset_name, asset_typeid, asset_typename, spe_model, manufacturer, purchase_date, orig_value, service_life, dep_id, dep_name, sto_location, resp_person, asset_state, depr_method, serial_num, asset_desc, attachment, cdate, udate,inventory_id
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from asset
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into asset (id, asset_code, asset_name, asset_typeid, asset_typename, spe_model, manufacturer, purchase_date, orig_value, service_life, dep_id, dep_name, sto_location, resp_person, asset_state, depr_method, serial_num, asset_desc, attachment, cdate, udate ) values (#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{assetCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{assetName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{assetTypeid,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{assetTypename,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{speModel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{manufacturer,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{purchaseDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{origValue,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{serviceLife,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{depId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{depName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{stoLocation,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{respPerson,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{assetState,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{deprMethod,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{serialNum,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{assetDesc,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attachment,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{udate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )

insert into asset
id,
asset_code,
asset_name,
asset_typeid,
asset_typename,
spe_model,
manufacturer,
purchase_date,
orig_value,
service_life,
dep_id,
dep_name,
sto_location,
resp_person,
asset_state,
depr_method,
serial_num,
asset_desc,
attachment,
cdate,
udate,
inventory_id,
#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{assetCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{assetName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{assetTypeid,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{assetTypename,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{speModel,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{manufacturer,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{purchaseDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{origValue,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{serviceLife,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{depId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{depName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{stoLocation,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{respPerson,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{assetState,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{deprMethod,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{serialNum,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{assetDesc,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{attachment,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{cdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{udate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{inventoryId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
mapper.update:
update asset
id = #{record.id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
asset_code = #{record.assetCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
asset_name = #{record.assetName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
asset_typeid = #{record.assetTypeid,jdbcType=INTEGER},
asset_typename = #{record.assetTypename,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
spe_model = #{record.speModel,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
manufacturer = #{record.manufacturer,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
purchase_date = #{record.purchaseDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
orig_value = #{record.origValue,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
service_life = #{record.serviceLife,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
dep_id = #{record.depId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
dep_name = #{record.depName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
sto_location = #{record.stoLocation,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
resp_person = #{record.respPerson,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
asset_state = #{record.assetState,jdbcType=INTEGER},
depr_method = #{record.deprMethod,jdbcType=INTEGER},
serial_num = #{record.serialNum,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
asset_desc = #{record.assetDesc,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
attachment = #{record.attachment,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
cdate = #{record.cdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
udate = #{record.udate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
inventory_id = #{record.inventoryId,jdbcType=INTEGER},

update asset set id = #{record.id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, asset_code = #{record.assetCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, asset_name = #{record.assetName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, asset_typeid = #{record.assetTypeid,jdbcType=INTEGER}, asset_typename = #{record.assetTypename,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, spe_model = #{record.speModel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, manufacturer = #{record.manufacturer,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, purchase_date = #{record.purchaseDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, orig_value = #{record.origValue,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, service_life = #{record.serviceLife,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, dep_id = #{record.depId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, dep_name = #{record.depName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sto_location = #{record.stoLocation,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, resp_person = #{record.respPerson,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, asset_state = #{record.assetState,jdbcType=INTEGER}, depr_method = #{record.deprMethod,jdbcType=INTEGER}, serial_num = #{record.serialNum,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, asset_desc = #{record.assetDesc,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attachment = #{record.attachment,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, cdate = #{record.cdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, udate = #{record.udate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} inventory_id = #{record.inventoryId,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update asset
asset_code = #{assetCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
asset_name = #{assetName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
asset_typeid = #{assetTypeid,jdbcType=INTEGER},
asset_typename = #{assetTypename,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
spe_model = #{speModel,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
manufacturer = #{manufacturer,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
purchase_date = #{purchaseDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
orig_value = #{origValue,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
service_life = #{serviceLife,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
dep_id = #{depId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
dep_name = #{depName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
sto_location = #{stoLocation,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
resp_person = #{respPerson,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
asset_state = #{assetState,jdbcType=INTEGER},
depr_method = #{deprMethod,jdbcType=INTEGER},
serial_num = #{serialNum,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
asset_desc = #{assetDesc,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
attachment = #{attachment,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
cdate = #{cdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
udate = #{udate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
inventory_id = #{inventoryId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update asset set asset_code = #{assetCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, asset_name = #{assetName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, asset_typeid = #{assetTypeid,jdbcType=INTEGER}, asset_typename = #{assetTypename,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, spe_model = #{speModel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, manufacturer = #{manufacturer,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, purchase_date = #{purchaseDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, orig_value = #{origValue,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, service_life = #{serviceLife,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, dep_id = #{depId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, dep_name = #{depName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sto_location = #{stoLocation,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, resp_person = #{respPerson,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, asset_state = #{assetState,jdbcType=INTEGER}, depr_method = #{deprMethod,jdbcType=INTEGER}, serial_num = #{serialNum,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, asset_desc = #{assetDesc,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attachment = #{attachment,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, cdate = #{cdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, udate = #{udate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
